name: ai-model-forge
description: AI Model Forge Platform — Fine-tune, chat, and deploy 500+ AI models
author: Model Forge

scripts.electron:dev: concurrently "npm run dev" "npm run server" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron electron/main.ts"
scripts.electron:build:win: npm run build && cd server && npm run build && cd .. && electron-builder --win --x64
scripts.electron:build:mac: npm run build && cd server && npm run build && cd .. && electron-builder --mac --universal
scripts.electron:build:linux: npm run build && cd server && npm run build && cd .. && electron-builder --linux --x64
scripts.cap:android: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.deploy:check: npm run typecheck && npm run build
